notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Braxton Ashcraft, assist to second baseman Brandon Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, first baseman Spencer Horwitz to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.
